## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --all-targets`

## Security and privacy

- [ ] No credentials, private keys, real server addresses, logs, or local databases are included.
- [ ] Host-key verification, path validation, credential storage, CSP, and log redaction are not weakened.
